recap: Replaced $ZSH_CONFIG_PATH with $OROSHI_ROOT/tools/term/zsh/config in theming/index.zsh and scripts/bin/colors-refresh.

Replaced $ZSH_CONFIG_PATH/$~.oroshi refs in heredocs; also fixed three pre-existing breakages: zshenv.zsh→split (removed obsolete source line), bats_git_worktree path format (fix-bug→my-repo--fix-bug), and bats_run_zsh API (file-path→command-string via source). Both suites green.

Replaced $OROSHI_ZSH_AUTOLOAD CURRENT= assignments with direct function calls (no $CURRENT); also fixed bats_run_zsh API (source→command-string) and stale color expected values (green:2→35, git-branch:17→105).
